scope: Port donor model catalog, provider info, and staged feature registry into AgenC's LLM registry layer

requiredBehaviors: store authoritative per-model context window metadata
store model input modality and tool/search capability hints
preserve default and supported reasoning levels accepted by AgenC
resolve exact, longest-prefix, and single-namespace model identifiers
feed the existing ModelRegistry and StaticModelsManager surfaces
edgeCases: newer bundled OpenAI models not present in the previous ad-hoc table
namespaced model lookup falls back to the suffix only for a single safe namespace
unknown models continue to use conservative fallback metadata
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/registry/registry.test.ts src/llm/model-registry.test.ts src/llm/models-manager.test.ts src/llm/capabilities.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: centralize built-in provider default model and base URL data
centralize provider API key env var hints
preserve request retry and stream idle timeout defaults
replace ad-hoc provider model catalog constants in config dependencies
edgeCases: AgenC hosted provider is marked as managed-auth-backed

requiredBehaviors: store feature stage and default-enabled metadata
normalize legacy feature keys onto AgenC-owned canonical keys
apply configured feature maps on top of defaults
normalize feature dependencies such as multi_agent_v2 requiring multi_agent
edgeCases: legacy apply_patch aliases map to apply_patch_freeform
experimental feature specs are discoverable for menus
